task_description: Phase 25: Universal Search - One search box that queries email, chat, docs, drive files, videos, posts, contacts, calendar, code. Builds RAG AI search mode, snippet highlighting, search history, content extraction (PDF/OCR/video), find similar, typeahead/search-as-you-type, and the unified API router on top of the Phase 22 hybrid search foundation.

verification.summary: All gates pass. @quant/search: 310 tests pass, @quant/search-indexer: 81 tests pass. Typecheck, lint, and build all succeed. v2 review fixes applied: PermissionResolver replaces client-supplied isAdmin, PDF fallback uses 8-char min + entropy/structural filters.
